privileged_info_summary: The environment is seeded with a channel named 'release-updates', populated with real Rocket.Chat release data from the GitHub API. The task explicitly requires the agent to set the channel topic to 'Official Rocket.Chat release tracker - GitHub source: https://github.com/RocketChat/Rocket.Chat/releases'.
